introHomepage.title: About {name} Maintenance Center
introHomepage.description: With over 10 years of experience in motorcycle maintenance and repair, {name} is proud to be a trusted destination for thousands of customers every year. We provide services from routine maintenance, oil changes, engine repair, to genuine spare parts replacement — all performed by skilled technicians.

faqServicepage.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faqServicepage.howOften: How often should I service my motorbike?
faqServicepage.howOftenAnswer: Regular servicing is recommended every 3,000 - 5,000 km or as suggested by the manufacturer. However, you should also look out for unusual noises, decreased brake performance, or worn tires.
faqServicepage.needBooking: Do I need to make a booking in advance?
faqServicepage.needBookingAnswer: Although you can walk in, we recommend booking in advance via phone or website to save time and ensure staff availability.
faqServicepage.warranty: Is there a warranty after repair?
faqServicepage.warrantyAnswer: We offer warranties for repairs and parts replacement depending on the service and parts used. Detailed warranty information will be provided during your visit.

priceServicepage.electricalNote: Depends on fault level & replacement parts

metaAboutpage.title: About Us
metaAboutpage.description: Learn more about our motorcycle maintenance and repair service center.

aboutUsSectionAboutpage.heading: About the Service Center
aboutUsSectionAboutpage.description: With over 10 years of experience in the motorcycle maintenance and repair industry, XYZ Service Center is committed to providing high-quality services and maximum customer satisfaction. We continuously strive to improve service quality and meet the increasing demands of our customers.
aboutUsSectionAboutpage.missionDesc: Our mission is to provide high-quality motorcycle maintenance and repair services, ensuring safety and absolute satisfaction for customers. We are committed to offering optimal and prompt solutions to keep your vehicle running smoothly.
aboutUsSectionAboutpage.visionDesc: XYZ Service Center aims to become a trusted leading name in the motorcycle maintenance and repair industry, not only locally but nationwide. We aspire to raise service standards, constantly innovate and develop to serve our customers in the best possible way.

awards.title: Excellent Service Certificate 2022
awards.description: Awarded by the Vietnam Engineering Association for outstanding contributions in vehicle maintenance.

awards.title: Best Customer Service Award
awards.description: Honored at the National Motorcycle Industry Exhibition 2022.

faqs.question: How often should I maintain my motorcycle?
faqs.answer: You should typically maintain your motorcycle every 1,000 – 1,500 km or every 2 – 3 months to ensure safe and optimal performance.

faqs.question: Does the center offer a warranty after repair?
faqs.answer: Yes, all services at the center come with a clear warranty policy depending on the repair type.

faqs.question: Do I need to book an appointment in advance?
faqs.answer: You can visit directly, but scheduling an appointment helps save time and ensures quicker service.

faqs.question: What kind of spare parts do you use?
faqs.answer: We guarantee to use 100% genuine parts or parts from authorized manufacturers.

services.title: Comprehensive Maintenance
services.description: Thorough vehicle inspection and maintenance for safe operation.

services.title: Scheduled Oil Change
services.description: Use of genuine oil for smooth engine performance.

services.title: Technical Repairs
services.description: Handling all technical issues from simple to complex.

founding.title: The Founding Story
founding.content: XYZ Maintenance Center was founded in 2013 by a group of passionate motorcycle engineers. Starting from a small garage with only 2 staff members, the center went through many challenges, from lack of equipment to building customer trust. Through dedication and the desire to elevate service standards, we gradually rose to become one of the most trusted maintenance centers in the region.

milestones.description: Established the center at small scale in Binh Thanh District.
Expanded with 2 branches and invested in modern equipment.
Team grew to 30 technicians, serving over 10,000 customers annually.
Received excellent service certification and expanded to 5 citywide branches.

activities.title: Free maintenance program for ambulances
activities.description: Our center supported frontline healthcare during the COVID-19 pandemic.

activities.title: Scholarship for young technicians
activities.description: Providing training and scholarships for students in automotive and motorcycle repair.

staffSection.heading: Our Staff
staffSection.description: XYZ Center is proud to have a team of skilled, experienced, and dedicated technicians. Each member holds professional certifications and undergoes thorough training.

faqs.1question: How do I schedule a maintenance appointment?
faqs.1answer: You can schedule maintenance on our website via the 'Book Now' button on the homepage or call our hotline. We’ll confirm and notify you of the appointment time.
faqs.2question: How long does periodic maintenance take?
faqs.2answer: It typically takes 30–60 minutes depending on your vehicle’s condition and required checks. More complex cases will be advised accordingly.
faqs.3question: Do I need to pay a deposit to book an appointment?
faqs.3answer: No deposit is required. Payment is made after service completion and satisfaction.
faqs.4question: Are replacement parts covered by warranty?
faqs.4answer: Yes, all genuine parts come with manufacturer warranty (3–12 months). Repair services are also covered (1–3 months).
faqs.5answer: We service all major brands like Honda, Yamaha, Suzuki, SYM, Piaggio, and more.
faqs.6question: Do you offer home rescue services?
faqs.6answer: Yes, within 15km of the center. Fees depend on distance and time. Contact our hotline for details.
faqs.7answer: We are open 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM daily, including weekends. Emergency support available 24/7.
faqs.8question: Can I get a service quote in advance?
faqs.8answer: Yes, check our price list on the website or contact us directly. We ensure transparent pricing.
faqs.9question: Which engine oil is recommended for manual bikes?
faqs.9answer: We recommend 10W-30 or 10W-40 oil. Our technicians will advise the best option.
faqs.10answer: Yes. Our membership program offers recurring service discounts, free oil change after 5 times, and more.
faqs.11question: Can I cancel a booked appointment?
faqs.11answer: Yes, at least 2 hours before the scheduled time. Cancel via website or hotline.
faqs.12question: My bike vibrates strongly—should I check it now?
faqs.12answer: Yes, unusual vibrations may indicate tire wear, bent rims, or suspension issues. Please visit us ASAP.
faqs.13answer: Yes, 6-month warranty for peeling or fading due to technical errors.
faqs.14answer: Yes, we accept all credit/debit cards and popular e-wallets.
faqs.15question: Can I request a specific technician?
faqs.15answer: Yes, if available at your scheduled time. Please inform us in advance.
faqs.16question: How can I give service feedback?
faqs.16answer: You can provide feedback at the reception, via email, or survey form after service.
faqs.17answer: Yes, some staff can communicate in basic English. Let us know when booking.
faqs.18question: Do you offer overnight vehicle storage?
faqs.18answer: Yes, secure overnight parking is available for long repairs. We’ll notify you and issue a handover receipt.

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.content: Motobike is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when using our services.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
content: Personal info: Name, phone number, email, vehicle details.
Technical data: IP, browser, access device.
Usage data: access history, service booking.

3.title: 3. How We Collect Information
content: Via cookies and analytics tools like Google Analytics.

4.title: 4. Purpose of Data Use
content: Improve service quality and personalize experience.

5.title: 5. Sharing Information with Third Parties
content: All sharing complies with law and is limited to necessary scope.

6.title: 6. User Rights
content: Request deletion or cessation of data use.
You may contact us to exercise these rights.

7.title: 7. Data Security
content: Encrypt data during transmission and storage.

8.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
content: Cookies help remember access settings. We use them to enhance experience and measure website performance.
You may disable cookies but it may impact experience.

9.title: 9. Children's Policy
9.content: We do not intentionally collect data from children under 13. If found, we will delete it immediately.

10.title: 10. Policy Updates
10.content: This policy may be updated. Changes will be announced and effective upon posting.

11.title: 11. Contact Information
content: Address: 123 Ly Thuong Kiet St, District 10, HCMC
